message:
feat(cli): add shared CLI context module and reformat flag array test (br-1i11 Track 7+)

New context.rs module:
- CliContext: sync DB connection for read-only CLI queries
- AsyncCliContext: async pool for write operations via storage layer
- resolve_project(): lookup project by slug or human_key
- resolve_agent(): lookup agent by name within project
- format_ts/format_ts_short/format_duration: consistent timestamp formatting
- resolve_bool(): canonical --flag / --no-flag precedence handling
- run_async(): bridge from sync CLI entry points to async storage operations
- 18 comprehensive unit tests covering context opening, project/agent
  resolution, formatting edge cases, and boolean flag conflicts

This module enables consistent, well-tested CLI handler implementations
and reduces duplication across operator tools.

lib.rs formatting:
- Expand flag array in help_macros_start_session_lists_flags() test across
  multiple lines for readability (no logic change)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9592,7 +9592,14 @@ sys.exit(7)
     #[test]
     fn help_macros_start_session_lists_flags() {
         let h = help_text_for(&["am", "macros", "start-session", "--help"]);
-        for flag in ["--project", "--program", "--model", "--reserve", "--inbox-limit", "--json"] {
+        for flag in [
+            "--project",
+            "--program",
+            "--model",
+            "--reserve",
+            "--inbox-limit",
+            "--json",
+        ] {
             assert!(
                 h.contains(flag),
                 "macros start-session help missing flag '{flag}'\n{h}"
